{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323030824707785DCADCAEBF282D6"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7605455782076039961","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"以“开矿污染”与“生态转型”的核心矛盾，精准切入当下乡村发展的痛点。没有回避经济发展与生态保护的尖锐冲突，让“绿色发展”不是一句口号，而是一场需要有人挺身而出、逆风而行的硬仗。人物塑造鲜活立体，有血有肉，语音轻松幽默，让严肃的乡村改革故事多了几分烟火气和趣味性。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770785637,"group_id":"7595120152220273726","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxP9oNQNLZe7Uc1yYsqzGEosU313bQjrvNYYDbW61VMb","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2779174390742635","user_name":"凉心阁的郑玉风"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2779174390742635","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7595120152220273726","book_info":{"abstract":"【乡土+农民致富+保护环境+影视剧改编+乡村爱情】央视一套、八套热播·乡村振兴现实题材口碑之作。一个女人，一座矿山，一场守护绿水青山的逆风之战！
本书根据同名电视连续剧改编而成。
天马山脚下有个村庄叫天马山村，这一天，突然发生村民大面积食物中毒，事情很快便传播开来。原来，天马山不仅风景优美，还发现了铅锌矿。这些年因为开矿，天马山村成为致富的典型，村支书梁广发也因此地位稳固，是村里说一不二的人物。但近些年来，不断有村民反映开矿造成的污染，都被梁广发死死压着。
天马山的下游是通天河水库，供应全市人民的饮用水。集体中毒事件被市、县领导知悉，怀疑河水已经被污染，决定来村里召开现场会。天马山的养花专业户李鲜花获邀参加此次会议。
李鲜花在会上直抒己见，赢得村民的信任，在选举时被选为村委会主任。她顺应民心，顶着保守派阻拦、幕后黑手陷害、资金严重紧缺等重重困难，逆风改革、招商引资，治理被污染的家乡山水，带领村民走向致富之路，实现了老有所依，深刻诠释了绿水青山就是金山银山的理念。
小说以用轻松幽默的语言制造强烈的戏剧冲突，以当下北方农村为背景，全景式描写农业、农民、农村的生活状态以及民俗风貌。
该剧曾在央视8套、央视1套、央视4套以及天津电视台、吉林电视台等多家电视台播放，收视率曾破1，全国同时段收视排名第一的好成绩。电视剧本曾获得吉林省文化最高奖“长白山文艺奖”。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/7db2cc1f81cc36a078858203477227b5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"马金萍","author_id":"","book_id":"7595120152220273726","book_name":"鲜花盛开的山村","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#304820","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"3020人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":45,"name":"影视小说","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=45&name=影视小说&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":991,"name":"国内影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=991&name=国内影视&genre_type=160&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7595130416336473112","read_count":"2807","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"496837"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.3","serial_count":"31","tags":"影视小说,国内影视","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7db2cc1f81cc36a078858203477227b5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779390504&x-signature=RSqelFjwts8O7j14RKpP5KqtJpM%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"5"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323030824707785DCADCAEBF282D6"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读44分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1858,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2649,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":83},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7610402887730086718","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看到小说的结尾，作者也说是按照电视剧的脉络进行了修改，就让我想到了最近看的一部影视剧，在乡村振兴这样的题材背景下，没有坐以待毙可以完成乡村致富。小说用幽默风趣的语言制造了戏剧冲突，全景式地描绘了农业、农民、农村的生活状态和民俗风貌。","text_exts":[{"e":42,"s":39,"text":"影视剧","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%BD%B1%E8%A7%86%E5%89%A7&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774206504EBF282D6%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227610402887730086718%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227595120152220273726%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%BD%B1%E8%A7%86%E5%89%A7%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1771936475,"group_id":"7595120152220273726","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4yLyF1sajpW7Fhv9kg1jcQUkj75oINAX9PXDRu0Yp//","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1080177581107658","user_name":"喜欢壶瓶枣的苏成才"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1080177581107658","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7595120152220273726","book_info":{"abstract":"【乡土+农民致富+保护环境+影视剧改编+乡村爱情】央视一套、八套热播·乡村振兴现实题材口碑之作。一个女人，一座矿山，一场守护绿水青山的逆风之战！
